home.title: Book airport transfer to/from
home.flightInfoMessage: Enter your flight number, for example, PS352 or W6123. This helps the driver track your arrival.
home.signSubtext: The driver will wait with your name

error.fillFields: Please fill in both "From" and "To" fields.
error.noAdults: There must be at least one adult passenger.

addCommentModal.title: Add special requests
addCommentModal.subtitle: Write important information for the driver: child seat, oversized luggage, or other details.
addCommentModal.cancelConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to permanently cancel this transfer?

transferSuccess.title: Request sent!
transferSuccess.subtitle: Drivers have received your request and will soon send you their trip options.

authScreen.title: AirChat: Airport transfers to and from
authScreen.driverLogin: Are you a driver? Log in to dashboard

registration.title: Create an account
registration.subtitle: Dive into the world of transportation!
registration.fillAllFields: Please fill in your name, email, and password.
registration.confirmationEmail: Success! Please check your email to confirm registration.
registration.mustAgreeToTerms: You must agree to the Terms of Service.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address to receive a password reset link.
resetPassword.emailSent: If this email is registered, you will receive an email with instructions to reset your password.

profile.noPhoneDriver: The driver did not provide a phone number.
profile.shareMessage: Check out driver {{driverName}}'s profile in the {{appName}} app: {{link}}
profile.loginToWrite: Please log in to your account to message the driver.
profile.passengerInfoBody: Public profiles are only available for drivers. Passengers do not have public pages.

settings.title: Settings
settings.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
settings.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
settings.modeInfoText: Driver mode allows you to view and accept orders. Passenger mode hides the driver interface, allowing you to use the app as a regular passenger.
settings.clearCacheBody: This will remove all downloaded images from the device storage. They will be downloaded again when needed. Continue?
settings.deleteAccountBody: This action is irreversible. All your data, chats, and transfers will be permanently deleted. Are you sure?
settings.deleteSuccessBody: Your account has been successfully deleted.

bannedModal.title: Account blocked
bannedModal.message: Your account has been blocked by the administrator due to community guidelines violation. You cannot use the app.
bannedModal.contact: If you believe this is a mistake, please contact support.

support.title: Support
support.formSubtitle: Leave your feedback, report an issue, or suggest an idea.
support.messageEmpty: The message field cannot be empty.
support.messageSent: Thank you! Your feedback has been sent.

transferDetail.title: Trip details
transferDetail.noOffers: No offers yet. Please wait, drivers will respond soon.
transferDetail.changeDriverConfirmText: Your trip will become available again for offers from other drivers.

transfersScreen.title: My transfers
transfersScreen.emptyState: Add your first transfer — and let's go on a journey!
transfersScreen.emptyArchive: Your archive is empty. Completed and cancelled trips will appear here.
transfersScreen.deleteConfirmBody_one: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected transfer? This action cannot be undone.
transfersScreen.deleteConfirmBody_few: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected transfers? This action cannot be undone.
transfersScreen.deleteConfirmBody_many: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected transfers? This action cannot be undone.

pending.title: Processing your request
pending.text: We will confirm the trip shortly.

accepted.title: Trip confirmed
accepted.text: Your driver has already been assigned.

offersAvailable.title: Offers available
offersAvailable.text: Choose the most convenient option for you.

alerts.callFailedCheckDevice: Could not complete the call. Please check if your device supports calls.
alerts.phoneNotFoundBody: This driver hasn't provided a phone number.
alerts.confirmCallBody: Are you sure you want to call the driver ({{phoneNumber}})?

onboarding.welcomeText: Plan your trips, book airport transfers and travel in comfort — all in one app.
onboarding.configureText: Choose the date, time, number of passengers, and luggage.
onboarding.readyText: Click the button below to get started.

successModal.title: Request created!
successModal.subtitle: We will notify you when a driver accepts your order.
successModal.commentPlaceholder: For example: child seat, large luggage...

chatList.title: Messages
chatList.noChats: You don't have any active chats yet.
chatList.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete the chat with {{name}}? All message history will be lost.
chatList.blockReasonRequired: Please specify a reason for blocking.
chatList.blockReasonSubtitle: This complaint will be sent to the administrator.
chatList.blockBody: You will no longer see messages from this user, and they won't see yours. Are you sure?

chat.deleteMultipleConfirmBody_one: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected message?
chat.deleteMultipleConfirmBody_few: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected messages?
chat.deleteMultipleConfirmBody_many: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected messages?
chat.noMessages: No messages yet. Write the first one!
chat.messageNotFound: Message is too old, scroll up

driverHome.title: Available transfers
driverHome.noFiltersSet: You have not configured your service areas. You see all requests.
driverHome.noRequests: No requests available at the moment

driverOffer.offerSent: Your offer has been sent to the passenger!
driverOffer.noOtherOffers: You are the first to make an offer!
driverOffer.alreadyOffered: You have already sent an offer
driverOffer.passengerNotified: The passenger has received your offer. Awaiting response.

authPrompt.title: Authorization required
authPrompt.subtitle: To book a transfer, please log in or register.

flights.searchAirport: City, name, or code (e.g., KBP, Kyiv)
flights.typeToSearch: Enter at least 2 characters to search
flights.tryDifferentSearch: Try another query or IATA code
flights.title: Flight schedule
flights.emptyList: No flights on the selected date
flights.subtitle: Select a route and date to view available flights.
flights.selectParamsAndSearch: Select the parameters above and click search to view the schedule.

errors.networkSubtitle: Could not connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.

myTrips.title: My trips
myTrips.emptyList: You have no accepted trips yet
myTrips.noPhone: The passenger did not provide a phone number.

passenger.step1:
Create a trip request:
specify where, to where, and when you plan to travel.
passenger.step2: Get a trip offer from EUROBUS.
passenger.step4:
Stay in touch via chat or phone and embark on your journey.
Have a nice trip!
